name: Interjection
scaffolding_intent: Displays a comic-style starburst with the problematic word from the child's speech, flagging grammatical or tense errors

parameters.name: word
parameters.description: Word or symbol displayed in the starburst

parameters.name: scale
parameters.description: Size multiplier for the interjection starburst

correction_intent: Child made a SEVERE grammatical error: wrong verb conjugation ('he go' instead of 'he goes'), wrong pronoun ('him is' instead of 'he is'), wrong tense for a present-tense scene ('will be cooking' instead of 'is cooking'), or severely broken sentence structure. Do NOT flag missing articles, informal speech, sentence fragments, or minor stylistic issues — these are normal for children aged 5-8. NOTE: if the child uses the wrong tense and the scene is in the present, use D4, NOT T1/T2.
